name_en: Top-tier replica M22481 This minimalist Fastline tote is made of soft calfskin, featuring a matching metal finish and a station. Leather rivets. Its adjustable handle allows you to wear it on your hand or shoulder. A spacious interior and multiple interior pockets give it a functional look. The LV tone initial logo is in the lower corner. 38 x 32.5 x 13 cm
